narrativeLines.text: npm led with 82% of 2,469 weekly downloads followed by PyPI (18%).

recommendations.title: High portfolio concentration
recommendations.detail: Gini coefficient 0.87 indicates downloads are heavily concentrated in a few packages. Diversify promotion efforts across the portfolio.

recommendations.title: Heavy npm dependency
recommendations.detail: 82% of downloads come from npm. Consider cross-publishing to PyPI and NuGet to reduce single-registry risk.

recommendations.title: 5 packages gaining traction
recommendations.detail: @world-forge/schema, @world-forge/export-ai-rpg, @world-forge/renderer-2d show organic growth with download spikes. Capitalize with blog posts, social media, or conference talks.

recommendations.title: 11 packages predicted to grow
recommendations.detail: Statistical models predict >20% growth in the next 7 days for @world-forge/schema, @world-forge/export-ai-rpg, @world-forge/renderer-2d.

recommendations.title: 1 package with repeated spikes
recommendations.detail: Multiple download spikes detected for @mcptoolshop/claude-guardian. Could indicate bot activity, viral posts, or dependency adoption.

actionableAdvice.title: 75 packages in critical health
actionableAdvice.detail: tool-compass, mcpt, file-compass, backpropagate, a11y-lint scored below 20/100.
actionableAdvice.action: Review these packages for broken installs, outdated dependencies, or missing documentation. Consider archiving if no longer maintained.

actionableAdvice.title: Portfolio concentration risk
actionableAdvice.detail: Gini coefficient 0.87 — downloads are concentrated in a few packages.
actionableAdvice.action: Promote underperforming packages in README badges, blog posts, and release notes of popular packages.

actionableAdvice.title: 4 packages surging
actionableAdvice.action: Capitalize now: write a blog post, tweet, or submit to newsletters. Post a "Thank you" issue or discussion.

actionableAdvice.title: 82% of traffic from npm
actionableAdvice.detail: Single-registry dependency increases blast radius if npm has outages or policy changes.
actionableAdvice.action: Cross-publish key packages to PyPI (via wrapper) or NuGet. Add install instructions for all registries in READMEs.
